english: Salutations to Adilakshmi, O embodiment of the Supreme Brahman
roman: Adilakshmi namaste astu Para Brahma svarupini

hindi: यशो देहि धनं देहि सर्वकामांश्च देहि मे॥
english: Grant me fame, grant me wealth, grant me all desires
roman: Yasho dehi dhanam dehi sarva kaman cha dehi me

english: Salutations to Dhanyalakshmi, O one full of grain, auspicious and pure
roman: Dhanyalakshmi namaste astu dhanya purne shubhe shubhe

english: O Goddess who bestows the wealth of grain, giver of all prosperity
roman: Dhanya sampat prade Devi sarva sampat pradayini

hindi: धैर्यलक्ष्मि नमस्तेऽस्तु जय जय लक्ष्मि धैर्यरूपे।
english: Salutations to Dhairyalakshmi — victory, victory to Lakshmi embodiment of courage
roman: Dhairya lakshmi namaste astu jaya jaya Lakshmi dhairya rupe

english: O boon-giver, supreme ruler, grant me excellent courage
roman: Varade Parameshani dehi me dhairyam uttamam

hindi: गजलक्ष्मि नमस्तेऽस्तु सदा मम हृदि स्थिता।
english: Salutations to Gajalakshmi, ever residing in my heart
roman: Gajalakshmi namaste astu sada mama hridi sthita

hindi: नित्यं लक्ष्मि महालक्ष्मि देहि मे परमं सुखम्॥
english: O eternal Lakshmi, Mahalakshmi, grant me supreme happiness
roman: Nityam Lakshmi Mahalakshmi dehi me paramam sukham

english: Thus whoever listens to this composed stotra of the eight forms of Lakshmi
roman: Evam ashta vidha Lakshmih stotren shrinuyat kritam

english: Lakshmi does not leave him and wealth and prosperity are born for him
roman: Tasya Lakshmirna chalati jayate dhana sampadam
